lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in fair condition. It shows moderate signs of wear on the interior and exterior. Most systems are functional, but some components show age and may require maintenance.

This vehicle is in fair condition and clearly reflects its age and mileage through regular use. The exterior has several visible scratches, a few small dings on the passenger doors, and some minor paint oxidation on the trunk lid. Inside, the cabin shows noticeable wear on the driver's seat bolster and a few permanent stains on the floor mats. While the car remains a reliable daily driver, the air conditioning is not as cold as it once was, and the suspension feels a bit soft, suggesting that some mechanical maintenance will be needed soon. It is a solid, functional option for a buyer who prioritizes utility over cosmetic perfection.

This vehicle is in poor condition and requires significant mechanical and cosmetic work. The engine has a pronounced knock, and the transmission is starting to slip. Externally, there is visible rust on the rocker panels and several large dents. The interior shows heavy wear, including torn seating and a broken climate control system. This car is being sold as-is and would be best suited as a parts car or a dedicated restoration project.

Get ready for your next journey with this wonderful vehicle! It’s in good condition and has been well-maintained, showing just the typical light wear that comes from careful use. This dependable car is ready to hit the road and offers a great balance of performance and value for its next owner.
This vehicle is in fair condition. The interior and exterior show moderate wear and some cosmetic issues. Mechanical systems are operational but require some maintenance or minor repairs.
Mint condition.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This unit exhibits an impeccable exterior finish and a pristine interior environment, reflecting a history of fastidious ownership. Every mechanical component operates with the precision intended by the original manufacturer. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of unparalleled integrity, suited for the most discerning professional.

Hey there! You seriously have to see this beauty in person! It is in absolute mint condition—I’ve babied this car from day one, and it honestly looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor. Not a single scratch or dent to be found, and the interior still has that fresh, clean smell. It’s been my pride and joy, but it’s time for it to find a new home where it’ll be just as loved. It’s a total dream to drive, and I’m sure you’re going to fall in love with it the second you get behind the wheel! Let’s chat and get you a look at your next favorite ride!

This vehicle remains in impeccable condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original showroom character. Meticulously serviced and sparingly driven, this motorcar represents an uncompromising standard of quality for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection. Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of uncompromising caliber, maintained to a standard that defies its previous ownership. This motorcar remains in showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless aesthetic and mechanical integrity that satisfies the most discerning collector. Every detail, from the immaculate upholstery to the precision-tuned powertrain, reflects a legacy of meticulous preservation. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of peerless quality.

Hey there! You have to see this absolute beauty. It's in incredible shape—honestly, it looks and smells like it just came off the showroom floor! I've babied this car since day one, and it drives as smooth as silk. If you're looking for something that feels brand new and has been loved every mile, this is the one for you. Can't wait for you to take it for a spin!

Offering a collector-grade E46 M3 in pristine condition. This example features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through individual throttle bodies and high-pressure double VANOS. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission provides tactile engagement, paired with a factory limited-slip differential. Mechanically flawless, the 'Big Three' (rod bearings, subframe reinforcement, and VANOS overhaul) have been proactively addressed using OE+ components. The chassis remains rigid, supported by a meticulously maintained suspension. Finished in Carbon Black Metallic with high paint depth and zero oxidation, the interior retains its factory-fresh Nappa leather and original trim. A true turn-key enthusiast piece with a documented service history.
Mint condition. Spotless interior. No mechanical issues. Original paint. Garage kept.

Presenting a truly exceptional, collector-grade vehicle that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. This car has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, shielded from the elements and road debris. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like factory finish, completely free of swirl marks, stone chips, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the premium upholstery remains taut with no bolster wear, and all interior surfaces are pristine, retaining that distinctive new-vehicle aroma. Every technological feature and electronic sensor operates with precision. Mechanically, this vehicle is beyond reproach, supported by a comprehensive, documented service history performed exclusively by certified technicians. The engine bay is detailed to a professional standard, reflecting the low-mileage, pampered life this car has led. For the buyer who accepts nothing less than perfection, this is a rare opportunity to own a flawless example of automotive excellence.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in impeccable showroom condition. Every facet of this motorcar reflects a standard of care that is truly extraordinary, from its flawless exterior finish to an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Meticulously preserved and mechanically superior, this offering represents a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a vehicle of unparalleled caliber and prestige.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in peerless condition. Every surface, from the hand-finished upholstery to the pristine exterior paintwork, reflects a standard of care synonymous with showroom quality. Mechanically flawless and aesthetically superior, this offering represents an uncompromising acquisition for the most discerning motorist.

Hey there! I am so excited to show you this absolute gem! This car is in truly pristine condition—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor. It’s been garage-kept, meticulously cared for, and is ready for its next adventure. You won’t find a single flaw on it! Come take a look, you're going to fall in love with how it drives!

Presenting a truly exceptional, showroom-quality vehicle that stands as a testament to meticulous ownership. This car is in flawless condition, finished in a deep metallic gloss that has been protected by a professional ceramic coating and kept exclusively in a climate-controlled garage. There are no stone chips, door dings, or imperfections to be found. Inside, the interior remains in an 'as-new' state; the premium leather seats show zero bolster wear, and the cabin is free of any odors or blemishes. Every electronic component, sensor, and convenience feature operates perfectly. Mechanically, the car is peak-performance ready, backed by a complete, documented service history and incredibly low mileage. This is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade example that drives exactly as it did the day it left the factory. For the buyer who demands perfection, look no further.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, a specimen maintained to the most exacting standards. This motorcar remains in immaculate, showroom condition, representing the absolute pinnacle of its class. Both the exterior finish and the interior appointments are flawless, reflecting a history of meticulous preservation and climate-controlled storage. Mechanically superior and aesthetically pristine, this vehicle offers an unparalleled acquisition opportunity for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hi everyone! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolutely pristine shape—it looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve babied it since day one, keeping it garage-kept and spotless. Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service records included. Inspection welcome.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation. This vehicle is in pristine, showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior paint retains its deep, mirror-like luster with absolutely zero rock chips, scratches, or swirl marks. Inside, the premium leather upholstery remains supple and free of any creases or wear, still carrying that distinct new-car aroma. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the dual-zone climate control, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a full documented service history with recent fluid flushes and a brand-new set of performance tires. With exceptionally low mileage and a flawless undercarriage, this is a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to own a vehicle that looks and drives exactly as it did the day it left the dealership. No accidents, no smoke, and no compromises—just pure perfection.

This exceptional vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, preserved in impeccable showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and displaying no discernible signs of wear, it offers a driving experience indistinguishable from its original manufacture. Every aesthetic and mechanical detail has been curated to meet the highest standards of automotive excellence. We invite discerning buyers to acquire a rare example of uncompromising quality and performance.
